qm_provenance.historical_prior_label: Bias-corrected: historical prior, global, not lead-aware
qm_provenance.rainfall_note: Rain occurrence prior may inform risk; rainfall amount correction remains strict/pending.

ts_proxy.formula: 0.35 x precipitation probability plus threshold contributions from rain, CAPE, lifted index, CIN, and local convective timing; WMO thunderstorm codes apply an 85-point floor.
